hero.subtitle: Solaripple leverages digital twin, AI, and optimization algorithms to provide integrated solar-storage-charging management and VPP trading services for commercial and industrial parks, reducing electricity costs and maximizing asset returns.

products.label: Core Products
products.title: Integrated Energy Management System
products.subtitle: From hardware layer to application layer, from real-time monitoring to intelligent decision-making — building a complete smart energy closed loop for industrial parks.

solarStorage.name: Solar-Storage-Charging
solarStorage.desc: Integrating solar, storage, and EV charging modules with real-time device monitoring, intelligent energy dispatch, and improved self-consumption rates.

digitalTwin.name: Digital Twin Platform
digitalTwin.desc: Three.js-powered real-time 3D mapping of industrial parks with device status and energy flow visualization, fully mobile-responsive.

vpp.name: Virtual Power Plant (VPP)
vpp.desc: Aggregating distributed storage, EV chargers, and interruptible loads to participate in grid peak shaving, frequency regulation, and demand response for additional revenue.

ai.name: AI Dispatch Engine
ai.desc: LSTM time-series forecasting combined with MILP optimization algorithms to predict load and solar output, enabling next-day dispatch planning and demand control.

platform.label: Digital Twin Platform
platform.title: EnOS — All-in-One Park Energy Management
platform.desc: EnOS (Energy Operating System) is Solaripple's industrial energy digital foundation, mapping physical energy assets into the digital world.
features: Real-time 3D visualization of park全景 with instant device status
AI load & solar forecasting for proactive dispatch decisions
VPP aggregation with real-time power market connectivity

cta.title: Ready to Upgrade Your Energy Management?
cta.desc: Whether for new parks or existing facilities, the Solaripple team provides full-process services from planning and design to operation and maintenance.

footer.brand: Guangzhilian · Dedicated to industrial clean energy digitization, serving parks in the Yangtze River Delta.
